Title: Open materials study
Abstract
The results suggest a small difference between conditions.
Methods
Participants (N = 110) were randomly assigned to a treatment group or control group. Materials and anonymized data are available in the supplementary repository and on OSF.
Results
The treatment group differed from control, p = 0.048, 95% CI [0.02, 0.55], Hedges g = 0.28.
Discussion
These findings suggest a modest but uncertain effect that should be replicated.
References
Adams, P. (2020). Example article.
